Title: User Community
QuerySelect:
SELECT 
    uc.UserId AS UserID,
    u.Username,
    STRING_AGG(CAST(uc.CommunityId AS VARCHAR(20)), ',') AS CommunityID
FROM UserCommunity uc
INNER JOIN Users u ON u.UserID = uc.UserId
GROUP BY uc.UserId, u.Username
ORDER BY u.Username
QueryInsert:
DECLARE @lidRid INT = (SELECT RoleID FROM Roles WHERE RoleName = 'Lid' AND PortalID = 0);
INSERT INTO UserCommunity (UserId, CommunityId, RoleId)
SELECT CAST(@UserID AS INT), CAST(value AS INT), @lidRid
FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommunityID, ',' )
WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(value)) <> ''
QueryDelete: DELETE FROM UserCommunity WHERE UserId = CAST(@pk AS INT)
QueryBulkDelete: DELETE FROM UserCommunity WHERE UserId IN ({ids})

Columns.Label: Naam
Columns.Pattern: SELECT u.UserID, u.Username FROM Users u INNER JOIN UserPortals up ON up.UserId = u.UserID WHERE up.PortalId = 0 AND u.UserID NOT IN (SELECT UserId FROM UserCommunity) ORDER BY u.Username

Columns.Label: Community
Columns.Pattern: SELECT Id, Name FROM Community ORDER BY Name
